mapper.select: select e.id, e.enterprise_name, coalesce(di.dict_label, e.industry) as industry, coalesce(dn.dict_label, e.enterprise_nature) as enterprise_nature, coalesce(ds.dict_label, e.enterprise_scale) as enterprise_scale, e.region_province_code, e.region_city_code, e.region_county_code, concat_ws('-', rp.region_name, rc.region_name, rct.region_name) as region_name, e.address, e.contact_person, e.contact_phone, e.description, e.status from enterprise_info e left join sys_dict_item di on di.dict_type = 'enterprise_industry' and di.dict_value = e.industry and di.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item dn on dn.dict_type = 'enterprise_nature' and dn.dict_value = e.enterprise_nature and dn.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item ds on ds.dict_type = 'enterprise_scale' and ds.dict_value = e.enterprise_scale and ds.enabled = 1 left join sys_region rp on rp.region_code = e.region_province_code left join sys_region rc on rc.region_code = e.region_city_code left join sys_region rct on rct.region_code = e.region_county_code where e.deleted = 0 and e.status = 1 order by e.enterprise_name

select e.id, e.enterprise_name, coalesce(di.dict_label, e.industry) as industry, coalesce(dn.dict_label, e.enterprise_nature) as enterprise_nature, coalesce(ds.dict_label, e.enterprise_scale) as enterprise_scale, e.region_province_code, e.region_city_code, e.region_county_code, concat_ws('-', rp.region_name, rc.region_name, rct.region_name) as region_name, e.unified_social_credit_code, e.business_license_path, e.address, e.contact_person, e.contact_phone, e.description, e.status from enterprise_info e left join sys_dict_item di on di.dict_type = 'enterprise_industry' and di.dict_value = e.industry and di.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item dn on dn.dict_type = 'enterprise_nature' and dn.dict_value = e.enterprise_nature and dn.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item ds on ds.dict_type = 'enterprise_scale' and ds.dict_value = e.enterprise_scale and ds.enabled = 1 left join sys_region rp on rp.region_code = e.region_province_code left join sys_region rc on rc.region_code = e.region_city_code left join sys_region rct on rct.region_code = e.region_county_code where e.id = #{id} and e.deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into enterprise_info ( enterprise_name, industry, enterprise_nature, enterprise_scale, region_province_code, region_city_code, region_county_code, unified_social_credit_code, business_license_path, address, contact_person, contact_phone, description, status, deleted ) values ( #{enterpriseName}, #{industry}, #{enterpriseNature}, #{enterpriseScale}, #{regionProvinceCode}, #{regionCityCode}, #{regionCountyCode}, #{unifiedSocialCreditCode}, #{businessLicensePath}, #{address}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{description}, #{status}, 0 )
mapper.update: update enterprise_info set enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, industry = #{industry}, enterprise_nature = #{enterpriseNature}, enterprise_scale = #{enterpriseScale}, region_province_code = #{regionProvinceCode}, region_city_code = #{regionCityCode}, region_county_code = #{regionCountyCode}, unified_social_credit_code = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode}, business_license_path = #{businessLicensePath}, address = #{address}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
